text.title: Embeddings Production Ops — Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from input brief to signed-off output config.

list.item: Input: Latency target, success target.
Action: Document (latency_p95, success_rate) + dashboards.
Output: ops/slo.md + Grafana panels.
Decision gate: If no dashboard infra, start with daily reports.
Input: API client.
Action: Wrap calls with exponential backoff + jitter + cap.
Output: client.py with tenacity decorator.
Decision gate: If 429s persist, request a quota bump from the provider.
Input: Logger + DB.
Action: Record per-call (tenant, use case, tokens, $cost).
Output: embedding_log table with the 4 fields.
Decision gate: If multi-tenant, cross-charge based on rows.
Input: Cache + fallback model.
Action: On provider error, fall back to cache, then to fallback model.
Output: fallback chain documented + tested.
Decision gate: If cache miss + fallback miss, surface degraded-mode banner.
Input: Future swap.
Action: Document dual-write, validation, cutover, deprecate steps.
Output: ops/migration-playbook.md.
Decision gate: If a swap is imminent, rehearse against staging first.
